MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

  • Release Notes
InputSignal C++

InputSignal illuminates how to get detailed signal format of input audio and video signal, including state information, resolution and color format of video signals, sample rate, channels and bit depth of audio signals. We recommended that anyone who is interested takes a close look at this example.
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\InputSignal

Supported Hardware

This example is supported by all the Magewell capture devices, but USB Capture Gen2/Plus Family only support digital audio.

Features

  1. Obtain detailed format of the input audio and video signals.
  2. Select the capture channel from multiple devices by specifying the command value.

Workflow

  1. To get device version, initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWGetVersion, MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find the valid capture card according to the device info,, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex

  3. Conduct any of the following steps to open a channel:

    1. To open the specified channel according to the command parameter, call: MWOpenChannel;
    2. To open the first available channel by default when there is not a specified channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath;
  4. To get the specific input signal status, call: MWGetInputSpecificStatus
  5. To get the video signal status, call: MWGetVideoSignalStatus
  6. To get the audio signal status, call: MWGetAudioSignalStatus
  7. To free up system resources and memory, call: MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

InputSignal
